data.body: bde5 pre-grounding (done while 4e9d suite runs): attest substrate map complete. bde5 = authorship signing/verify MACHINERY (not auto-signing every write - that's 3183). Design: register_scheme(SshsigScheme()) + POLICY['rebar.authorship.v1']=Policy('sshsig','rebar.authorship.v1'); sign via sshsig.sign(pae_bytes,key_path,namespace) into a dsse.Envelope (keyid=principal=identity id); verify via registry.verify(kind,envelope,trust_root) where trust_root=allowed_signers built from identity entity's in-band keys[] (authorized-keys lines -> '<principal> <keytype> <keydata>'). Needs ssh-keygen>=8.9. Test: event signed by A verifies vs A's keys, NOT vs B's; tampered payload fails. New module likely src/rebar/attest/authorship.py.
